There is a strong focus on learning, communicating, and connecting for you this month, dear Aries. Your mind is curious, and transportation and communication channels might open up for you. You can be exceptionally busy in your daily life. The final days of the month can bring a revelation that prompts you to make important changes in your work.

You can be filled with ideas and possibilities this month. Things that you've previously resisted learning can suddenly become appealing and relevant. Conversations with friends can be inspiring and stimulating. But another strong theme running through June revolves around home life, family, and personal matters. You're looking for familiar, safe, and secure situations and setups. Slowing down, taking time for yourself, and connecting with family are in the spotlight.

June is a strong month for efforts to build and fortify important areas of your life, dear Taurus. You might bring recent ideas and endeavors to life and build or develop these projects. With a New Moon in your solar second house on the 14th, you’ll be wanting results, but you’re also very willing to put in the necessary time and energy to achieve your goals.

You're exploring different ways of building your sense of value and worthiness this month. In fact, there can be some wonderful inspiration and imagination surrounding business and finances. You can benefit greatly from natural or earthy activities that renew your connection to the world around you or the world of the five senses. If you’re feeling especially sensitive about your worth or value to others, it’s a time to deal with this bravely but also civilly.

With the Sun in your sign for the first three weeks of June, dear Gemini, all eyes are on you! Even so, Mars doesn't reach Gemini until the 28th, so your energy levels may be low, and you could be feeling on the fence about several matters, after which you confidently and perhaps aggressively go after what you want.

The month ahead is one of your yearly "new beginnings" or fresh start. You have a New Moon occurring on the 14th, but Mars is still quiet in your privacy sector until the 28th, making going after what you want a little more complicated than you might expect. At the same time, you're drawing positive attention and are well-positioned to attend to your personal plans and needs in June.

Mercury is in your finances sector from the 1st onward, Venus is there until the 13th, and the Sun is there from the 21st onward. As such, June is a notable month for making money or attracting the right resources your way. Still, it gets a bit complicated with Mercury retrograde from the 29th onward and in its shadow from the 12th. Picking and choosing your projects carefully may be a good idea.

Your inner world is a strong draw and area of focus this month, dear Cancer, and a good part of you is likely to remain a little reserved or withdrawn until after the third week of June. Generally speaking, this is a time for privacy, relaxation, and preparation. There can be a lot of focus on the past or on emotional issues, but with your sign strongly emphasized all month, you're never truly short of attention.

It’s a little easier than usual to put your emotional needs first and put something that’s been weighing you down behind you. Interestingly, Mercury spends virtually all month in your sign, and it turns retrograde on the 29th, giving you even more reason to reflect and rest rather than push big decisions. Still, the Sun moves into your sign on the 21st and lights up your world. If others are misunderstanding you in the last week of June, you may very well find new ways of expressing yourself that can be especially satisfying.

The New Moon on the 14th reinforces a need to look within. Rest is in order, but so is mindful attention to your tasks and chores, and the trick will be to find the right balance. You’re not exactly putting everything on hold, but there’s a call to take more time for yourself to recharge. This New Moon supplies you with the desire and energy to let go of things you no longer need and attend to your mental and emotional wellness. It’s a great time to clear the decks.

Friendships and group associations can often be a focal point for you in June, dear Leo. Around the New Moon on the 14th, interesting opportunities for friendships and partnerships can arise suddenly. Venus enters your sign on the 13th, and this ups your powers of attraction considerably. If you've been on the fence about your feelings or a love relationship, this may be the time when you become clearer and more demonstrative. It's also a time to attract positive attention.

You have strong influences with you this month, encouraging you to reach for the stars and pursue your goals, dear Virgo. Taking a second look at past ideas or projects can be particularly rewarding, or you could find a lot to love with current ventures. You can enjoy quite a bit of enthusiasm about a project or business matter this month, and hurdles seem smaller as a result! Fortunately, you’re incredibly resourceful now. Your desire and drive to be efficient are kicking in wonderfully.

This month, you're more committed to realizing success, more determined, ambitious, and cognizant of the need for structure and order in your life. The New Moon on the 14th helps these things along. You might enjoy referrals or other forms of reward, recognition, or support. A fresh start or new path can be in the offing. People are more likely to notice you for your performance and actions.

You’re seeking mental engagement in June, dear Libra, as the Sun moves through your solar ninth house for the first three weeks of the month. You’re spirited and self-expressive this month. It’s certainly easier for you to get worked up about opinions and causes, as you are a little more sensitive to what’s going on around the world. It’s a fine time to expand your mind and break out of your usual routine. The desire to develop, learn, and grow is real, and you’re likely to find satisfying outlets for doing so.

Even so, you're also paying special attention to your larger responsibilities and goals in June. You communicate with more awareness of how your message comes across. People are looking to you for answers, and they’re expecting you to be quite mature and responsible. Business affairs assume greater importance, especially with the Sun's move to the top of your solar chart on the 21st. You’re more accountable for what you do and say, and you may take the lead in a particular field or with a unique project. There could be new goals or ambitions.

You can be more confident in your path or happier about where you’re heading. Making plans and setting goals is exciting now. Not only are you attracting positive attention, but you’re also inspiring trust. It’s an excellent time for being productive.

June brings a focus on your special interests, dear Scorpio, as well as developing and building your close relationships. The Sun in your intimacy sector for the first three weeks of the month encourages you to work on power dynamics and sharing. Learning and experiencing new things is also a strong theme. It's a great time to learn more about your own field or interests, but also to explore new ones. Intimacy can blossom. Your tendency now is to see the hidden layers or elements of a situation to your advantage, as now you know how to work out a problem from the inside out.

Even so, opportunities to break the routine and get away are likely to emerge as your solar ninth house holds quite a bit of power all month. A change of scene from time to time can help your overall mood.

More often than not, you’re drawn into your inner world this month, and you’re in excellent shape for making internal changes that can have an influential impact on your life. Shared finances, loans, support, intimate relationships, and personal changes are in strong focus. You can also experience wake-up calls or unexpected events related to finances, dependencies on others, and/or intimate matters. Keep an open mind and heart, and see where they lead you.

Sagittarius datesare approximately from November 22 to December 21. However, it’s important to note that all Sun sign dates are approximate since they change from year to year. In other words, they’re dependent on your birth year, and in some cases, birth time. If your birth date is on or near either of these dates, then you may have a Sagittarius Sun sign or something else (Scorpio or Capricorn). Be certain with the following tool:What’s My Sun Sign?

You begin June on an emotionally-charged and motivated note with the Full Moon in your sign just behind you, dear Sagittarius. It's a time of self-discovery and of recognizing feelings and needs you may have been holding at bay or brushing to the side. This comes at a relationship-focused time for you, with the Sun in the partnership sector of your solar chart until the 21st. After all, recognizing your feelings and needs is an important process as you explore your partnerships, dependencies, and relationship needs.

Your intimacy sector is strong all month, and an introspective streak is with you. A focus on special relationships or specialized, focused projects and activities is a real sub-theme in June. Conversations and interactions tend to be a little deeper than usual, or else they don’t hold your interest for long. It’s a time to accept others’ help, share responsibilities, and combine resources or talents to advance your goals.

Work and health matters are in sharper focus in June, dear Capricorn, and coming to a better balance or state of order is a theme. Organizing, chores, and health pursuits are favored, and a new project or commitment to wellness can be in the works, especially after the New Moon on the 14th.

Putting in the effort to improve your daily routines is enjoyable, and it can feel good to rise to a challenge, especially one of your own making. You enjoy helping others, and people tend to be grateful for it. Still, you’re gravitating to activities and projects that bring intrinsic rewards. Your approach can be on-and-off, but when you're "on," you go the extra distance. You might also be exploring alternative therapies and approaches to health and fitness.

The Sun spends time in your enjoyment sector until the 21st, dear Aquarius, and a New Moon occurs in this same, favorable part of your chart on the 14th, bringing even more power to areas ruled by this sector. These include romance, creativity, hobbies, entertainment, children, and pleasure. Confidence in sharing and expressing yourself more freely is on the upswing. At the same time, your work and health sectors are strong all month, making a good balance very achievable in June.

Relating and creating are big themes for you this month. It's a strong month for exploring creative urges and for sharing your affection, joy, and experiences with others, as you seem to feed off others’ responses.

June brings a strong focus on home and domestic affairs, dear Pisces, with fresh thinking and new solutions to old problems. Still, even though it's a nesting phase of sorts, your personal life is busy this month. There can be some surprises and excitement in the mix, and with your joy and entertainment sector active all of June, you're also enjoying and expressing yourself. You're settling in and keeping the peace, and your attention to domestic matters brings rewards and positive feedback. You might focus on ways to earn money from home. Perhaps most importantly, you're getting into deeper touch with your innermost needs and desires.

Things seem to flow more naturally on an emotional level, making it easier to take action and to make effective decisions. You might take steps towards future security goals–you have no desire to dwell on the past at the moment.

A creative, romantic, and playful theme gains momentum in June. This period is strong for making significant emotional and creative changes that encourage a sense of personal empowerment. It's fairly easy to drum up support.
